frontmatter.title: A model of countable nondeterminism in guarded type theory
frontmatter.meta: @inproceedings{bizjak-birkedal-miculan-2014, author = {Bizjak, Ales and Birkedal, Lars and Miculan, Marino}, editor = {Dowek, Gilles}, publisher = {Springer}, booktitle = {Rewriting and Typed Lambda Calculi -- Joint International Conference, RTA-TLCA 2014, Held as Part of the Vienna Summer of Logic, VSL 2014, Vienna, Austria, July 14-17, 2014.
